programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E50 - Shaun'. Bluey and Bingo want a pet. To show them how much work they'd be in for, Dad gets to transform his hand into their old friend Shaun, a chaotic, undisciplined Emu with a taste for trouble.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E51 - Daddy Putdown'. When Mum goes out to a baby shower, Dad takes charge of the girls' evening routine. But with Bluey missing Mum, Dad has to pull out all the games he knows to keep them entertained.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E55 - Dance Mode'. After Dad eats her last chip, Bingo is given three chances to put Mum and Dad in 'Dance Mode' as payback. But the others can't resist taking Bingo's turns for her.

programme.title: Dog Squad
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Mission: Muddy Puddle'. Meagaidh the Border Collie is a search and rescue dog who works with her owner Tom. Joe and his daughter Kate are lost at the top of a really steep hill. Tom and Meagaidh must race to find them.

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures
programme.desc: 'S1/E21 - Andy and the European Hamster'. Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to Vienna, Austria, in search of European hamsters. The team discover that wild hamsters have a taste for flowers and candle wax.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E25 - Taxi'. Bluey is running a taxi service. Her first passenger is Businessman Dad, who is in a rush to get to the airport. But with unexpected delays, Dad's in danger of missing his flight!

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: 'S1/E44'. Supertato's Tato belt gets locked inside a glass case for an exhibition, but Tomato can't remember the code to get it out again, and Supertato needs it back to defeat Evil Pea.

programme.title: Swashbuckle
programme.desc: 'S7/E14'. When Sandy teases Seaweed saying he is a dangerous dancer, Seaweed panics, thinking he must be growing extra limbs and turning into a squid.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - The Claw'. When Bluey and Bingo are unable to grab a prize on a Magic Claw machine, Mum and Dad create their own version at home. But Dad isn't about to make winning easy.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - Markets'. When Bluey visits the markets with five bucks from the tooth fairy, the options are endless. But as she and Indy look for the perfect purchase, spending it proves hard.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E21 - Blue Mountains'. Bluey, Bingo, Mum and Dad play a game of hand puppets, exploring the land beyond the Blue Mountains where they outsmart the Cheeky Fox to find the softest ever beds.

programme.title: Pop Paper City
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - A Band for the Stand'. Helping Hand builds a bandstand, so Mae-Mae decides to form a band with her friends.

programme.title: Swashbuckle

programme.title: Inside The Factory
programme.desc: 'S6/E1 - Cider'. Gregg Wallace visits the biggest cider factory in the world, which produces more than 350 million litres each year.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Best Laid Plans'. Jon and his wife Lally brave extreme arctic conditions as they attempt to secure food.

programme.title: The Misadventures of Romesh...
programme.desc: 'The Misadventures of Romesh Ranganathan. S3/E1 - Christmas in The Hebrides'. Romesh Ranganathan spends a week visiting the isles of Skye, Harris and Lewis, guided by local crofter Donald 'Sweeney' Macsween.

programme.title: Life in Colour With David Attenborough
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Seeing in Colour'. The natural world is full of colours. For us, they are a source of beauty, but for animals they are a tool for survival. David Attenborough reveals the extraordinary ways in which animals use colour.

programme.title: Treasures Decoded
programme.desc: 'S5/E4 - Egypt's Lost Princess'. A newly discovered royal tomb in the Valley of the Kings, holding a 3000-year-old mummy of an unknown Egyptian princess, is rewriting ancient Egypt's history.

programme.title: Scottish Islands with Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Northern Outer Hebrides'. Ben Fogle returns to Taransay, the island where, over 20 years ago, he took part in the TV show Castaway.

programme.title: Inside The Factory
programme.desc: 'S6/E1 - Cider'. Gregg Wallace visits the biggest cider factory in the world, which produces more than 350 million litres each year.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S5/E2 - Bluewaters Island'. In this episode, a vast new island is appearing from the seas off Dubai to house the world's biggest observation wheel - twice the size of the London Eye.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: 'S2/E7 - Cold Harvest'. Jon and his brother Lee search a vast expanse of tundra.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Alaska'. Ben learns grizzly bear protection and storm navigation with a couple who live in a Mongolian-style yurt in the Alaskan wilderness.

programme.title: World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Switzerland'. Bill Nighy narrates a journey that starts at Tirano and climbs up through the Italian Alps and lakes through into Switzerland, taking in the Landwasser Viaduct.

programme.title: Joanna Lumley's Great Cities of...
programme.desc: 'Joanna Lumley's Great Cities of the World. S1/E2 - Rome'. Joanna continues her travels to Rome, a city like no other on earth. She zips into the city on the back of a Vespa to get her first glimpse of the beauty that awaits.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S7/E8 - Iceland'. Ben journeys to the freezing coastal waters of Iceland to live with Hakon, a former carpenter who overcame alcohol and embraced a clean, solo life in the wilderness on an private island.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S9/E15 - Open Wounds'. The Alaskan residents are either hunting birds to stock up their freezers, training their young families how to fish or training up a puppy to be a hunting dog.

programme.title: The Misadventures of Romesh...
programme.desc: 'The Misadventures of Romesh Ranganathan. S3/E1 - Christmas in The Hebrides'. Romesh Ranganathan spends a week visiting the isles of Skye, Harris and Lewis, guided by local crofter Donald 'Sweeney' Macsween.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - New Zealand'. Ben goes to New Zealand and spends time with a hunter-gatherer couple who have raised two teenagers in complete isolation.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - Two Feet and a Heartbeat'. While Becky Brodrick and her husband are busy building an exercise enclosure for their working dogs, Pierre-Yves and Kim need to collect berries and fish for a hgh-energy food boost during the winter.

programme.title: Extreme Treks
programme.desc: 'S4/E2 - Ethiopia, Simien Mountains'. The Simien Mountains is an exotic and dramatic landscape set in the northern corner of Ethiopia. Breath-taking views abound in this natural landscape inhabited by unique and endangered wildlife.

programme.title: Life in Colour With David Attenborough
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Seeing in Colour'. The natural world is full of colours. For us, they are a source of beauty, but for animals they are a tool for survival. David Attenborough reveals the extraordinary ways in which animals use colour.

programme.title: The Highland Vet
programme.desc: 'S2/E9'. Miniature Bull Terrier Bonnie is a serial wood eater.

programme.title: World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Spain'. Beginning near Leon, part of the famous north Spanish Pilgrimage, in the Picos de Europa mountains, this railway journey then runs through the Basque country before arriving in Bilbao.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S5/E3 - Whistler'. In this episode, man versus snow - engineers battle the elements to build an incredible record breaking mountain town on the Canadian Pacific seaboard.

programme.title: Engineering Reborn
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. One of the several reinforced concrete highway overpasses constructed in the 1960s was Seoullo 7017. This deteriorating liability was transformed into an elevated green park by Dutch architects MVRDV.

programme.title: Life in Colour With David Attenborough
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Hiding in Colour'. David Attenborough reveals the extraordinary ways that some animals use colour to hide and disappear into the background.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S7/E9 - Siberia'. Maverick scientist Nikita was a former maths student living in the city, when hhis father asked for help with an extraordinary experiment in one of the most remote places on the planet.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S9/E16 - Chasing Ghosts'. With Alaska in bloom, its residents must continue to utilize their days to pursue resources and opportunities to enrich their lives.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S5/E4 - Seattle's Floating Bridge'. In this episode, engineers have a mammoth challenge on their hands as they try to build a railway on one of the longest floating bridges in the world in Seattle.

programme.title: World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Spain'. Beginning near Leon, part of the famous north Spanish Pilgrimage, in the Picos de Europa mountains, this railway journey then runs through the Basque country before arriving in Bilbao.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out
programme.desc: 'S3/E8 - Amping Up The Steaks'. Michael Symon uses coffee throughout his whole meal, starting with chicken-fried steak with pepper gravy that has a hint of coffee.

programme.title: Hot Dish With Franco
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Comfort Food'. Franco Noriega makes a Peruvian feast! The menu features fluffy arepas, juicy roasted chicken, cheesy boiled potatoes, and a refreshing cocktail.

programme.title: Hot Dish With Franco
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Brunch'. Franco Noriega serves up brunch! He whips up his piled-high avocado toast, and an elevated take on a Tex-Mex huevos rancheros with fried tortilla strips.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S43/E1 - Grills On! Game On!'. When the ovens and fryers are turned off, four chefs get their grill on. A rare meat hits the heat in round one, and they work with a frozen food favourite.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S29/E2 - Quick, Easy Weeknight Dinners'. Ree Drummond serves four quick and easy weeknight dinner winners! She makes shrimp sheet pan pita, jalapeno popper tacos and five-spice steak bowls.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S29/E3 - Never Enough Pasta'. Ree is on the ranch where there is never, ever enough pasta. From Greek spaghetti and meatballs to fried ravioli with chocolate, she plays with pasta all ways!

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S29/E4 - All In The Game'. Ree Drummond and her crew cook up football tailgate food. Her strawberry cobbler squares and spicy mango barbeque turkey meatballs make up her winning spread!

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S29/E5 - Fall Favourites'. Ree celebrates autumn with a seasonal salad with spicy brittle, very veggie soup and her go-to dish for entertaining, wine-braised chicken with apricots.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S29/E6 - Quick And Easy Sweet Treats'. Ree cooks up some sweet treats in her kitchen! She makes a puff pastry braid with nuts and chocolate and her irresistible four-berry chimichangas.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S29/E7 - Let's Get Toasted'. It's a feast for toast lovers in Ree's ranch kitchen! She makes a creamy chicken pot pie served on crispy brioche and an incredible French onion grilled cheese.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S29/E8 - Super Easy Italian'. Ree Drummond serves up simple dishes with an Italian spin. First up, she makes Italian beef sandwiches followed by a spaghetti pizza pie and mozzarella sticks.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S29/E9 - What To Bring'. Ree celebrates Thanksgiving with delicious dishes to take to holiday parties. She makes caramelized onion and white cheddar mac and pumpkin scones with coffee glaze.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S29/E10 - One Potato, Two Potato'. Ree cooks up delicious dishes with different kinds of potatoes! She makes purple sweet potato soup and shares the secret ingredient in her potato dumplings.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S29/E11 - Small Bites, Big Day'. Ree is full of Christmas spirit and makes delicious small bites for the big day! She cooks peppermint rolls, crispy cauliflower cakes and festive steak bites.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S29/E12 - One-Pan Crowd Pleasers'. Ree cooks up her favourite one-pan crowd pleasers for Christmas! She makes easy Tex-Mex chicken and rice and braised short ribs and carrots to celebrate.

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: 'S26/E5 - Fall Throwdown'. The hosts get creative with their favourite autumn produce. There's easy cheese and cranberry stuffed grilled chicken and a rutabaga, turnip and pear gratin.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S43/E2 - Hot Dog Hotshots'. The chefs' epic hot dog battle includes a state fair treat with a twist. An intriguing dessert basket contains the mysterious 'wieners in a quilt.'

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S34/E7 - Hard Hat Party At The Ranch'. Ree Drummond's favourite women are visiting her new house, and she whips up mini pineapple shrimp tostadas, chocolatey trifles and fruity mojitos!

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S34/E8 - Dad Delivery'. Ree Drummond delivers rustic handmade chicken noodles, cheesy and rosemary biscuits and decadent truffles to her dad and stepmother in their new home.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S34/E9 - Rotisserie Chicken Dinners 4 Ways'. Ree Drummond turns rotisserie chicken into four quick dinners that feature gnocchi, BBQ chicken salad, artichoke bread bombs and tacos.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S34/E10 - Oklahoma Classics'. Ree Drummond shares favourite foods from Oklahoma, including saucy tots, a sensational burger, crispy okra and an over-the-top root beer float.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S34/E11 - Sweet Summer'. Ree Drummond cools down on hot summer days with a decadent ice cream, party-ready treats, classic dipped cones and boozy frozen prosecco grapes.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S34/E12 - Treats For Todd'. Ree Drummond has a care package for her son Todd that's loaded with berry tarts, chocolatey oatmeal bars, cheesy snack mix and colourful pretzels.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods With Andrew Zimmern
programme.desc: 'S10/E4 - Discovering Columbus'. Andrew traces the path of Christopher Columbus' expedition across the Dominican Republic. He eats cow stomach stew and native Taino flatbreads.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S38/E3 - Champion Chefs'. Guy Fieri visits restaurants owned by familiar faces. Antonia Lofaso is cooking up out-of-this-world global flavours, and Justin Warner is serving up righteous ramen.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S38/E4 - From Chicken To Noodles'. Guy Fieri stops by a sweet and savoury joint in Omaha, a champion's mashup in Los Angeles and a real deal Italian spot in Connecticut.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S54/E13 - Wanna Pizza Me?'. It's a pizza style showdown as four chefs battle for $10,000. A notorious pizza topping features in the entrée round and dessert deals them a controversial topping!

programme.title: Alex Vs America: Chefs' Cut
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Chefs' Cut: Alex Vs No Meat'. Alex Guarnaschelli and Eric Adjepong join up to watch chefs specializing in vegetarian and vegan cuisine take their shot against Alex.

programme.title: Hot Dish With Franco
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Comfort Food'. Franco Noriega makes a Peruvian feast! The menu features fluffy arepas, juicy roasted chicken, cheesy boiled potatoes, and a refreshing cocktail.

programme.title: Hot Dish With Franco
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Brunch'. Franco Noriega serves up brunch! He whips up his piled-high avocado toast, and an elevated take on a Tex-Mex huevos rancheros with fried tortilla strips.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: 'S14/E1 - Dying Diner'. Robert Irvine travels to Escondido, California to help a novice restaurant owner completely transform her struggling retro diner.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S38/E15 - Flavor World'. Guy Fieri dives into cultural cuisine starting in Phoenix, Arizona. Then, he tries authentic Argentine in Boulder, Colorado, and Ethiopian meats in Memphis, Tennessee.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S52/E1 - Pie In The Sky'. Four chefs set out to make perfect pies! In the appetiser round, one chef scrambles to stay on track when a competitor refuses to share a popular pantry ingredient.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: 'S34/E13 - Nashville Hot, Bobby ...Not'. Country music superstar Martina McBride and chef Alex Guarnaschelli jam with chefs Drew Erickson and Aristide Williams to tune Bobby Flay up.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: 'S34/E14 - Ready For Their Close Up'. Chef Geoffrey Zakarian and model Ashley Graham strike a pose to distract Bobby Flay while chefs Maiya Keck and Brian Cripps go in for the win.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay Vs Symon Vs Jackson
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Hometown Favorites'. Bobby Flay, Michael Symon and Eddie Jackson get to know their teams better through nostalgic challenges that inspire them to dig deep into their memories.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S53/E3 - Buzzworthy Bizarre Baskets'. The basketeers outdid themselves for this special competition, featuring mandatory ingredients that leave the chefs shaking their heads in disbelief.

programme.title: Guilty Pleasures
programme.desc: 'S2/E12 - Chocolate Obsessions'. Chefs and celebrities confess their gluttonous secrets. Geoffrey Zakarian samples a chocolate souffle and Marc Summers takes on a tower of chocolate treats.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: 'S30/E10 - Guy's Summer Games Finale'. The final four chefs take a nostalgic trip to summer camp. They must net the fish to use in their fish dinner and show off their archery skills!

programme.title: Tournament Of Champions
programme.desc: 'S2 - Round One Continues'. Guy hosts as the tournament continues with first-round battles. In one-on-one sudden death clashes, three chefs conquer their opponents and the Randomizer.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S34/E10 - Cookin' From Scratch'. Guy's trying out all kinds of scratch-made specialties on this trip. In Houston, he samples a roasted carrot pizza and a short rib sandwich.

programme.title: Vegas Chef Prizefight
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Its All About The Show'. The remaining chefs cook with a larger-than-life ingredient. Then, the candidates must add a theatrical element to dinner at Mr. Chow at Caesar's Palace.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: 'S16/E4 - Out With Old, In With New'. In Port Jervis, New York, Robert helps a restaurant with an identity crisis. The owner needs a change or this small-town gem will have to close.

programme.title: Magnolia Table with Joanna Gaines
programme.desc: 'S4/E1 - Special Occasion Favorites'. Joanna puts a twist on a classic dish that has become a family favourite: raspberry chipotle pork tenderloin. For dessert, she makes a chocolate cola cake.

programme.title: Gold Divers
programme.desc: 'S5/E13 - Teamwork'. Emily swallows her pride and offers ex-friend Zeke a job on the Eroica. Plus, Derek runs into trouble while dredging in a gold-rich area and begrudgingly sends out an SOS.

programme.title: Texas Metal
programme.desc: 'S4/E1 - Tale Of Two Fords'. A long-time client wants to improve upon a near-perfect '68 Ford Ranger. The team creates an all-new custom chassis, handmade interior and Coyote 5.0 engine swap.

programme.title: What Could Possibly Go Wrong?
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Deadly Donuts Of Fire'. Kevin and Grant turn a blast of air into a ring of fire when they build a Vortex Cannon. They use quantum physics to send a Levitating Racer around a track.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America
programme.desc: 'S2/E12 - Iowa Vs Utah Grudge Night'. After the final Wildcard matchup, racers hit the streets for some grudge racing. The Detroit racers prep for a matchup against the Northeast.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America
programme.desc: 'S2/E13 - Ne Vs Detroit Part 1'. Detroit and the Northeast face off in the first matchup of round 1. Rankin has a new group, while Chucky's Detroit legends have an extra year of knowledge.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S2/E9 - Family Owned'. Guy Fieri visits some great family-owned restaurants around America. He goes to a diner in Massachusetts, a burger joint in Chicago and a Mexican eatery in San Diego.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: 'S16/E5 - Episode 5'. Ever wondered how everyday items such as filigree glass, fish food and motor homes are made? More common items are put under the microscope to find out.

programme.title: Mega Engineering
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Dome Over Houston'. The Houston Dome Project is a radical attempt to provide a solution to the city's damage from hurricanes, heat and the growing problem of global warming.

programme.title: Mega Engineering
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Bering Strait Tunnel'. Connecting Russia and Alaska this would be the most ambitious and expensive tunnelling project ever attempted. CGI shows how the project could take shape.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: 'S16/E6 - Episode 6'. Ever wondered how everyday items such as surgical instruments, ketchup and double-decker buses are made? More common items are put under the microscope to find out.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America
programme.desc: 'S2/E14 - Ne Vs Detroit Part 2'. The matchup between Detroit and the Northeast rages on and it won't be an easy win for either. In this battle, it will come down to the very last race.

programme.title: Mega Engineering
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Personal Pods'. Personal Pods are a high-speed, non-stop, self-driving transit system that could solve traffic problems in Washington DC. How would they work?

programme.title: What Could Possibly Go Wrong?
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Raiders Of The Lost Keg'. Kevin and Grant find a way to chill a drink in less than a minute. Plus, they play backyard astronaut in an attempt to send a camera to the edge of space.

programme.title: How The Universe Works
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Supernovas'. Life is created in unimaginably large explosions called supernovas, scattering the elements formed in the heart of stars. What can they teach us about our origins?

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America
programme.desc: 'S2/E14 - Ne Vs Detroit Part 2'. The matchup between Detroit and the Northeast rages on and it won't be an easy win for either. In this battle, it will come down to the very last race.

programme.title: Mega Engineering
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Underground City'. Chicago is home to some of America's most iconic skyscrapers, but with real estate at a premium, could an underground city be the solution to the space crunch?

programme.title: What Could Possibly Go Wrong?
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Raiders Of The Lost Keg'. Kevin and Grant find a way to chill a drink in less than a minute. Plus, they play backyard astronaut in an attempt to send a camera to the edge of space.

programme.title: How The Universe Works
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Supernovas'. Life is created in unimaginably large explosions called supernovas, scattering the elements formed in the heart of stars. What can they teach us about our origins?

programme.title: Junkyard Empire
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Never Easy'. Andy thinks he's got an easy new way to make money - selling tricked out golf carts to his Dad's buddies. But when he tries to build one, it's harder than he thought.

programme.title: Ultimate Survival
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Patagonia 2'. Bear tackles extreme survival situations in Panama. The searing heat and humidity of the jungle pushes him to the limit as he encounters plunging waterfalls and mudslides.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America
programme.desc: 'S2/E15 - Ne Vs Detroit Grudge Night'. The racers stick around to lock in grudge races for money and data on the road. NOLA struggles to get their rides in tune to stay in the game.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection

programme.desc: 'S24/E29'. The American pick up truck goes all electric, we've also got one of the smallest and cheapest cars ever featured on the show, plus an Italian design with British underpinnings.

programme.title: Rev
programme.desc: 'S24/E29'. REV puts the new XPENG G6 electric SUV to the test. French city of Montpellier's free public transport aims to cut emissions. We visit California to find out about the EV adoption.

programme.title: Richard Hammond's Workshop
programme.desc: 'S2/E5'. Richard faces a gun-toting client, who is anxious for work to start on his vintage Bentley. And poor planning threatens The Smallest Cog's chance at a car show.

programme.title: Monaco Historique Highlights
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. The event culminates tributes and anniversaries in the form of real races in the authentic and majestic setting of the Principality's circuit.

programme.title: ALL THINGS MOTORING INTERNATIONAL
programme.desc: 'S7/E10'. Mike and Themba visit Montecasino for Idle DRIVE 2 UNITE Charity Car, Bike & 4x4 Run, and Ernest attends the Winter Charity Drive at the Flamingo shopping Centre.

programme.title: The Bike Show
programme.desc: 'S24/E29'. On the Bike Show this week, the sporty, new Suzuki GSX-8R, a couple riding around the world on delivery bikes and a sad story of a bike shop burning down.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 - 2/11'. Sludge takes on foreign roads and strange loads in New Zealand, Turbo's new truck gets busted on a tour of destruction and Carl Andrews has more worry than one trucker can take.

programme.title: Love Cars: On the Road
programme.desc: 'S1/E3'. Tiff checks out high-voltage motorsport. The team prepares for battle in a full track test of a pair of sports SUVs. Paul gets the keys to a Pagani Zonda Cinque.

programme.title: Up to Mischief
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. We see the Mischief crew start a build for the Lemons 9-hour race. Izelle discovers the magic of Black Horse Estate. The crew takes part in great Racing for Change Gymkhana event.

programme.title: Buyer's Guide

programme.title: Petrolheads
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 - 2/11'. We touch down in KZN for the Chatsworth Motor Show. Sbu's racing skills are put to the test on a simulator. Mzansi's celebrities take the Maserati Ghibli to the track.

programme.title: Fast Lane

programme.title: White People Money
programme.desc: In this hilarious satire, a couple learns that having a lot of money comes with many troubles after they win $1 billion and try to keep it a secret from everyone.

programme.title: Welcome To Mama's
programme.desc: A delightful romance. After inheriting an Italian restaurant, a young woman teams up with a charming but slightly egotistical master chef to relaunch it.

programme.title: Center Stage
programme.desc: Dance fans will love this film filled with passion and love. Three young woman become friends at a prestigious ballet school. But life at the school is hard and tests their bond.

programme.title: Conni: Secret Of Mau The Cat
programme.desc: A charming animation. Conni's cat Mau follows her on her kindergarten trip, causing mayhem, confusion and laughs. The children are kept busy hiding Mau from the teachers.

programme.title: Timecrafters: The Treasure Of...
programme.desc: 'Timecrafters: The Treasure Of Pirate's Cove'. A wholesome adventure film. When time-travelling pirates wind up in the modern era, they face a group of kids with high-tech gadgetry.

programme.title: The Magic Flute
programme.desc: A music-filled fantasy. 17-year-old Tim Walker travels to the Austrian Alps to attend the Mozart boarding school. There, he discovers Mozart's 'The Magic Flute.'

programme.title: Little Loopers
programme.desc: A golfer with an attitude meets his match with a group of teens in this family sports movie. A former golfer sentenced to community service must teach teenagers to play.

programme.title: The Queen's Corgi
programme.desc: A spunky, fun-filled canine animation. The Queen's favourite, but most rowdy dog, escapes from the palace and finds himself lost. He must somehow find his way back home.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Jack Black enters the mystic world of martial arts in this animated adventure. An obese, mild-mannered panda is thrown into the middle of a battle for the fate of China.

programme.title: Dreamgirls
programme.desc: An ensemble cast leads this Academy Award-winning musical drama. Fame and fortune await a trio of talented young women in the early 1960s, but it's not all glitz and glamour.

programme.title: Father Of The Bride
programme.desc: Andy Garcia and Gloria Estefan drive this remake of the 90s classic. Generations collide when the father of a Cuban-American family comes to grips with his daughter's upcoming wedding.

programme.title: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: A wedding gets turned on its head in this outrageously funny comedy. A rivalry between a maid of honour and a bridesmaid for the bride's affection, leads to all sorts of chaos.

programme.title: Analyze This
programme.desc: In this comedy, Robert De Niro is a New York Mob boss who decides to see a psychiatrist. His new doctor is horrified to discover that his patient is a needy and insecure mobster.

programme.title: Into The Deep
programme.desc: An intense action thriller. A young woman is swept off her feet by a mysterious stranger who promises her a romantic boat trip. What follows is deceit, mistrust and violence.

programme.title: Above Suspicion
programme.desc: Emilia Clarke drives this true story-inspired action thriller. The working relationship of an FBI informant and her handler becomes intimate and ends with tragic consequences.

programme.title: 3 Days In Malay
programme.desc: A gripping WWII action film inspired by a true story. A group of Marines must defend their airfield in Malay against the Japanese for three days.

programme.title: Black Warrant
programme.desc: Oscar nominee Tom Berenger stars in this action-packed thriller. A semi-retired assassin and DEA agent team up to stop a cyber terrorist organisation.

programme.title: Immortal City Records
programme.desc: A thrilling crime drama. After accepting a job at Immortal City Records, an aspiring singer's dreams turn into a nightmare as she gets tangled up in the label's dark secrets.
John Cusack stars in this Roland Emmerich-directed cataclysmic film. A man struggles to keep his family alive when a series of global catastrophes threatens to annihilate mankind.

programme.title: Full View
programme.desc: Full View makes sense of all the news of the day. The show also features 30 minutes of market sense in-depth.

programme.title: It's Topical

programme.title: The Late Edition
programme.desc: A 360 view of all the stories that made headlines through packages, features, and interviews. This is also a platform for late-night breaking stories and or any developing news stories through the night.

programme.title: Morning Live

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: Agenda breaks down the stories of the day, as set in Morning Live, in more detail and giving stories more substance as the story develops. These stories take news agenda forward.

programme.title: On Point
programme.desc: On Point follows the development of the general news of the day in-depth where the show informs viewers on the further developments on the stories. This is a blended segment with 2 hours of general news and markets segment for an hour.

programme.desc: SA Today is issue-driven and covers regional topical issues in an interview format. Invited guests give more depth on big provincial and regional stories that can be an issue of national importance. It also includes general news.

programme.desc: Full View makes sense of all the news of the day. The show also features 30 minutes of market sense in-depth.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Trouble With Toes'. Surgery to correct a woman's webbed toes becomes a crisis for Dr. Schaeffer when she develops a dangerous complication that could cost the patient her toes.

programme.title: Monsters Inside Me
programme.desc: 'S5/E10 - The Brain Coloniser'. Three lively people suddenly come face to face with their own mortality. In Virginia, a teen suffers seizures and sudden blindness when her brain is attacked.

programme.title: Monsters Inside Me
programme.desc: 'S5/E1 - My Daughter's Going Crazy'. Three women living in vastly different locales have one thing in common: they've become unwitting hosts to baffling and deadly terrors inside them.

programme.title: Monsters Inside Me
programme.desc: 'S6/E2 - My Vacation From Hell'. The lives of three families are jolted - one infection rips a man's leg apart, and a rare brain infection pushes a seven year old girl toward suicide.

programme.title: Seeking Sister Wife
programme.desc: 'S5/E13 - Seeking Our Forever'. Potential sister wife Mariam sends mixed messages to Garrick. Meanwhile, the Davises have a big decision to make after Jasmine's sleepover.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Happily Ever After?
programme.desc: 'S8/E14 - Pillow Talk: Malice in Wonderland'. Series favourites watch the latest episode from their own homes. The dads are in the house for a special Father's Day Celebration.

programme.title: My 600-Lb Life: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: 'S7/E4 - Julian & Cindy'. Weight loss leads to exciting things when Julian and his wife Irma adopt a baby. Plus, Cindy needs to change her attitude to lose some weight.

programme.title: Cake Boss
programme.desc: 'S2/E16 - Chimps, Cinema And Crumb Cake'. The crew is making a cake for the Bronx Zoo's 110th birthday and a creation for the opening of the only movie theatre in Hoboken.

programme.title: Cake Boss
programme.desc: 'S2/E17 - Castles, Cannolis And Cartoon Characters'. Buddy, Mauro and their families are in Disney World to make cannolis for the Epcot Food and Wine Festival.

programme.title: Kitchen Boss
programme.desc: 'S1/E32 - Cooking From The Heart'. Buddy follows his Aunt Nina's recipes to serve stuffed mussels, sautéed escarole and a ricotta cheesecake with a Strega twist - but will she be impressed?

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Roy & Ben'. Extreme Cheapskates Ben and Roy show off their frugal lifestyles. Ben demonstrates how to throw a party on a $4 dollar budget and Roy shows how he freezes his assets.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: 'S6/E26 - Sarah's Story Part 2'. After a difficult childhood with an abusive stepfather and drug-addicted mother, Sarah weighs over 600-lbs and is fighting for her life at only 24 years old.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Happily Ever After?
programme.desc: 'S8/E14 - Malice in Wonderland'. Angela confronts Michael about the incriminating evidence she found. Thais' friends question Patrick's loyalty, and Emily's parents debate the dowry.

programme.title: I am Shauna Rae
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - The Girl With The Daith Earring'. Shauna clocks in for her first day at her new job! Later, Patty makes an announcement to Tara and Shauna that leaves her in tears.

programme.title: I am Shauna Rae
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - The Mystery Man'. Shauna makes plans with a potential new love interest and Patty works to get answers about the BRCA gene. Plus, Rylee shares her coming out story.

programme.title: I am Shauna Rae
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Shauna In The City'. Shauna, Rylee and Naiyh go on a girls' weekend getaway to New York City to celebrate Shauna's birthday and attend the Pride March.

programme.title: I am Shauna Rae
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - A Fishy Date'. The family helps Tara with wedding plans. Also, Shauna's online friend visits, and she learns more about him as they make sushi together.

programme.title: Seeking Sister Wife
programme.desc: 'S5/E12 - Seeking Common Ground'. The Merrifields invite a new potential sister wife to the house for the weekend without telling Nathalia. The Davises invite Jasmine over for a slumber party.

programme.title: Unexpected: Teenage & Pregnant
programme.desc: 'S6/E1 - We're The Kids In America'. Emalee and Nate attend school and Nate's motocross tournament. Jenna and son Luca return to Pennsylvania. Kayleigh facetimes her boyfriend, Graham.

programme.title: Outdaughtered
programme.desc: 'S6/E3 - Riley And The Catwalk'. The Quints prepare to be supermodels at a fashion show. Plus, Danielle attempts to juggle Uncle Dale, bad weather and a disastrous hot chocolate bar.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons
programme.desc: 'S8/E19 - Trent's Yule Log'. It's Christmas time and Santa Claus has left one of the Johnstons a very special surprise. Plus, Liz celebrates her birthday with a hoedown and jello shots!

programme.title: Cake Boss
programme.desc: 'S3/E15 - Helmet Cake, Healthy Mauro And Huge Trainers'. It's National Train Day, so Buddy and the team have a go at making a huge cake, complete with tunnels for model trains to pass through.

programme.title: Cake Boss
programme.desc: 'S3/E16 - Strawberries, Sinatra And Sick Ovens'. Buddy makes a yummy cake for the Frank Sinatra themed Broadway show Come Fly Away, but trouble is afoot when the ovens start playing up again.

programme.title: Kitchen Boss
programme.desc: 'S1/E38 - Italian Entertainment'. Buddy shares his favourite finger food recipes including grilled oregano chicken skewers, and polenta cakes served with goat's cheese and shiitake mushrooms.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: 'S8/E11 - Tommy's Story'. Tommy wants to lose weight so he can marry his fiancée, but to break the cycle of pathological eating, he must face a piece of his past he has always kept secret.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons
programme.desc: 'S9/E9 - Keep The Johnstons Weird'. The Johnstons go to Austin, Texas for the LPA conference. Trent and Amber compete in the talent show. Liz and Brice need to tell their parents something.

programme.title: Outdaughtered
programme.desc: 'S7/E7 - Cheer Dad'. While Danielle preps for her first Moms of Multiples meet-up, a fashion show and therapy. Plus, Adam signs the Quints up to be Jr. Cheerleaders.

programme.title: Match Me Abroad
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Look Through Your Book'. Chad overshares on his first date in Colombia. Plus, Harold is open to new matches and a new look, and Stanika digs into her date's issues.

programme.title: Monsters Inside Me
programme.desc: 'S6/E3 - There's Something Living In My Knee?!'. A mysterious outbreak leads to a four year old boy drowning in his own mucus, and a wound in a seven year old's knee has a vile cause.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons
programme.desc: 'S9/E9 - Keep The Johnstons Weird'. The Johnstons go to Austin, Texas for the LPA conference. Trent and Amber compete in the talent show. Liz and Brice need to tell their parents something.

programme.title: Phaneroo With Grace Lubega
programme.desc: 'S5/E28'. A dynamic, life-transforming and generational impacting ministry. The Greek word Phaneroo is translated as bringing to manifestation that which existed but is not seen.

programme.title: Arise And Shine With Festus Nsoha

programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Satanic Swamp'. Freetown, Massachusetts, sits next to a forest associated with unexplained events. Were dark forces released when the original inhabitants were displaced by settlers?

programme.title: Paranormal Lockdown
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Anderson Hotel'. When a hotel in Kentucky closed its doors, not everyone checked out. Over their 72-hour confinement, Nick and Katrina watch as their cameraman is savagely bitten.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: 'S4/E14 - Hunt For The Ruby Slippers'. Josh investigates the theft of one of the most iconic pieces of Hollywood memorabilia: the ruby slippers worn by Judy Garland in The Wizard of Oz.

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Bunkers'. The truth behind America's secret bunkers - from backyard boxes to government mini-cities. Underground bunkers have featured in war planning since the dawn of time.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: 'S4/E14 - Hunt For The Ruby Slippers'. Josh investigates the theft of one of the most iconic pieces of Hollywood memorabilia: the ruby slippers worn by Judy Garland in The Wizard of Oz.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: 'S100/E7 - Challenges in Cheltenham, England'. A couple tries to compromise during their move to Cheltenham, England. He is reluctant to leave his fashion business in North Carolina. Can they agree?

programme.title: Rebel Gold
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - In Gold We Trust'. The search for lost rebel gold continues in Washington. Brant guides his team deep into the venomous snake infested woods where he faces a potential mutiny.

programme.title: Rebel Gold
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Confederate Fortune'. The search for lost rebel gold continues at the last stop on Jefferson Davis's money train. Larry follows the direct route of Jefferson Davis.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot
programme.desc: 'S2/E31 - Heart Of Squatchness'. The team travels to Vietnam in search of the Wildman, a bi-pedal ape similar to Bigfoot in its ability to elude man. But will they be able to locate it?

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Alcatraz'. We'll explore a conspiracy that helped three inmates escape the dungeon of Alcatraz, and discover the remnants of a mysterious military outpost linked to Abraham Lincoln.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Museum
programme.desc: 'S11/E4 - Man on Wire'. Don Wildman examines the greatest high-wire stunt in history. Plus, he unravels one of the most bizarre hoaxes the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Rebel Gold
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Treasure Train'. In 1865, a train carrying $20 million of Confederate money saw 39 kegs of silver coins vanish. 150 years later, a team of treasure hunters attempt to track it down.

programme.title: Rebel Gold
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Chester Treasure'. Continuing the hunt for lost gold, the group moves on to Jefferson Davis's next stop. Larry and Brant split up to explore different theories of its location.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot
programme.desc: 'S2/E32 - Lone Star Squatch'. The team travels to East Texas to investigate thermal footage that may show a Bigfoot spying on a campsite. But is it just a mistaken case of identity?

programme.title: Expedition Mungo
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Cold Blooded Peruvian Predator'. The villagers of Yacumama live in fear of a 150 ft. long super-snake that has attacked and killed. Mungo embarks on a mission to learn the truth.

programme.title: UFO Witness
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Alien High Tech'. A startling new report claims a prominent astrophysicist worked on an aircraft reverse-engineered from the parts of downed UFOs. Ben Hansen investigates.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - David And Goliath'. In the summer, the massive ice sheet melts on Greenland, revealing immense mineral wealth in the virgin rock for a group of eight American prospectors.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - There's No Place Like Storo'. The miners have their first target on Storø. Finding accessible targets within close distance to the camp is crucial for the success of the expedition.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot
programme.desc: 'S2/E33 - Return To Boggy Creek'. On this special episode, the team journeys to the Deep South to investigate suspicious activity in the spooky swamps outside of Fouke, Arkansas.

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - The UFO Cover-Up'. Discover the truth behind the UFO cover up. Did a Nazi flying saucer crash in New Mexico? Are aliens living at Area 51? Or are these rumours to hide the real story?

programme.title: Mysteries At The Museum
programme.desc: 'S11/E5 - Prehistoric Mystery Meat'. Don uncovers the truth behind a culinary caper that stunned the world and inspects a ceramic toilet that inspired a taboo-busting invention.

programme.title: UFO Witness
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Aliens Underground'. The small town of Dulce, New Mexico, may harbour an underground alien base. Ben Hansen travels there to investigate if the rumours are true.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: 'S4/E15 - Jean Lasifi's Treasure'. Josh ventures to the American south to uncover the mystery of real-life buccaneer Jean Laffite and the location of his hidden treasure.

programme.title: Ghosts Of Morgan City
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Irish Bend Soldier'. Reports of an apparent ghost soldier in Franklin, Louisiana are cause enough for the team of paranormal experts to be called in.

programme.title: The Dead Files
